title: Paragon Integration
description: An Integration represents a third-party SaaS application that can be connected and configured through Paragon's Connect Portal.

id.description: The unique identifier for the integration.

name.description: The display name of the integration (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot).

type.description: The integration type identifier used in API paths (e.g., salesforce, hubspot).

enabled.description: Whether the integration is enabled for the authenticated user.
